title: pelargonium × stiftii
intro: Pelargonium × stiftii, also known as Stift's Pelargonium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium tomentosum and Pelargonium crispum. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium × stiftii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × stiftii, such as teas and tinctures, have been used in various parts of the world to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
